%I A______ (placeholder)

%S 1,7,27,82,226,597,1545,3957,10080,25605,64944,164592

%N BFS layer sizes of the 6D right-corner orthoscheme reflection group with six pairwise distinct positive perpendicular legs.

%C The 6D right-corner orthoscheme has vertex V_0 with six mutually perpendicular legs of pairwise distinct positive lengths. W is the reflection group generated by reflections in the seven bounding facets; a(n) is the number of distinct affine isometries of W at minimal word length n (the size of BFS layer n in the Cayley graph).

%C a(n) equals the coefficients of the exact Coxeter (Steinberg-Solomon) Poincare growth series of this diagram: a path on seven nodes in which consecutive facet pairs are labelled infinity and all non-consecutive pairs are perpendicular (m=2, commuting). The realized growth is therefore NOT the free Coxeter maximum, since the perpendicular (commuting) facet pairs reduce the word growth below the free-product bound.

%C Leg-independence (Class C): for six pairwise distinct legs every consecutive dihedral angle is an irrational multiple of pi (Niven-Conway-Jones), which reduces the relevant relation to a rank-0 descent on specific elliptic curves; hence the affine representation is faithful, the realized growth equals the abstract Coxeter word-growth, and a(n) is a leg-independent closed form. This is a theorem (Bonfioli 2026, Class C), not a conjecture. Verified by exact-rational BFS on legs (1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 11) through depth 8 and by power-series expansion of the generating function.

%F G.f.: (1 + t)^4 / (1 - 3*t + 3*t^3).

%F a(n) = 3*a(n-1) - 3*a(n-3) for n >= 5.

%F Asymptotic ratio a(n+1)/a(n) -> 1 + 2*cos(2*Pi/9) = 2.5320888..., the largest real root of x^3 - 3*x^2 + 3, which is the reciprocal (reverse) polynomial of the g.f. denominator 1 - 3*t + 3*t^3 (the n = 6 case of r_n = 1 + 2*cos(2*Pi/(n+3))).

%H Vico Bonfioli, <a href="https://github.com/elvec1o/pythagorean-reflection-sequence">The Universal Right-Triangle Reflection Sequence (Unequal Legs)</a>, GitHub repository, 2026.

%H Vico Bonfioli, <a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20370090">The Universal Right-Triangle Reflection Sequence (Unequal Legs)</a>, Zenodo, doi:10.5281/zenodo.20370090, 2026.

%Y Cf. A396406 (2D case).
%Y Cf. A008137 (3D all-equal-legs cube corner; affine Weyl group B~_3 growth series).

%K nonn,easy,more

%O 0,2

%A Vico Bonfioli
